title: Brand Context Protocol
description: Schema for BCP v0.1 brand.md root files.

bcp_version.description: Version of the BCP specification used (e.g., '0.1').

brand_name.description: The name humans call your brand.

file_type.description: Specifies this is the root brand.md file.

tree_version.description: Semantic version of this brand's specific BCP tree.

daughter_files.description: Registry of available daughter spec files.
